name: webex-connector
description: Webex control-room bridge for Codex sessions.

WXCD_CBTH_SOCKET_PATH.description: Unix-domain socket path for cbth plugin RPC.

WXCD_PLUGIN_HOME.description: Writable plugin home managed by cbth.

WXCD_CBTH_LIFECYCLE_SOCKET.description: Optional dedicated Unix-domain socket path for cbth lifecycle RPC.

WXCD_CBTH_PRE_ACTIVE.description: Start with Webex external work admission quiesced for shadow health checks.
